stages.concept:
# Unit 053: 조동사 will - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **조동사 will**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I **will** help you with your homework.
> 내가 너의 숙제를 도와줄게.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **will**은 여러 의미로 쓰여요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **미래** — ~할 것이다

> It **will** be sunny tomorrow.
> 내일은 화창할 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **의지** — ~할게, ~하겠다

> I **will** study hard.
> 나는 열심히 공부하겠다.

**Q. 다음 중 will의 의미가 나머지 둘과 다른 것을 고르세요.**
1. I will study hard. (의지)
2. It will be cold tomorrow. ✅ (미래)
3. I will help you. (의지)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **요청** — ~해 주시겠어요?

> **Will** you open the window?
> 창문을 열어 주시겠어요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **부정문**: will not = **won't**

> I **won't** be late again.
> 나는 다시 늦지 않을 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **의문문**: Will + 주어 + 동사원형?

> **Will** you come to my party?
> 내 파티에 올 거니?

🧑‍🎓 학생: will은 미래, 의지, 요청에 쓰이고, 부정은 won't! 간단하네요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 053: 조동사 will - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I will (     ) my uncle tomorrow.
> **정답** visit

---

**02.** She will ? a doctor someday.
> **정답** be

---

**03.** They will not ? to the party.
> **정답** come

---

**04.** ? you help me with my bags?
> **정답** Will

---

**05.** He will ? the piano at the concert.
> **정답** play

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She will goes to the store later.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** goes → go

---

**07.** I will not eats lunch today.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** eats → eat

---

**08.** Will they comes to the game?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** comes → come

---

**09.** He will watches a movie tonight.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** watches → watch

---

**10.** We will not goes to school tomorrow.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** goes → go

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 열심히 공부할 것이다.
I study hard.
> **정답** will

---

**12.** 그녀는 내일 일찍 올 거야.
She come early tomorrow.
> **정답** will

---

**13.** 우리는 이번 여름에 바다에 가지 않을 거야.
We go to the sea this summer.
> **정답** will not (won't)

---

**14.** 너는 나를 도와줄래?
you help me?
> **정답** Will

---

**15.** 그들은 새 학교에서 잘 할 거야.
They do well at the new school.
> **정답** will

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 내년에 기타를 배울 것이다.
will learn I the guitar next year
> **정답** I / will / learn / the / guitar / next / year

---

**17.** 그녀는 주말에 쉬지 않을 것이다.
She rest will not this weekend
> **정답** She / will / not / rest / this / weekend

---

**18.** 너는 나와 함께 갈래?
Will with go you me
> **정답** Will / you / go / with / me

---

**19.** 우리는 곧 만날 것이다.
will We meet soon
> **정답** We / will / meet / soon

---

**20.** 그는 선물을 좋아할 거야.
will the gift He like
> **정답** He / will / like / the / gift
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 053: 조동사 will - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I __________ be a teacher in the future.
have
was
am
will
> **정답** will

---

**02.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
She won't play the piano tomorrow.
is going not to play
are not going to play
is not going to playing
is not going to play
> **정답** is not going to play

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
They __________ have a meeting next month.
She __________ go fishing tomorrow.
are going to - will
are going - is going
will - be going to
will - are going to
> **정답** are going to - will

---

**04.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
[2개]
Amy는 이번 주말에 가족들과 놀이동산에 갈 예정이다.
Amy will go to an amusement park with her
family this weekend.
Amy are going to an amusement park with her
family this weekend.
Amy is going to go to an amusement park with
her family this weekend.
Amy be going to go to an amusement park
with her family this weekend.
> **정답** Amy is going to go to an amusement park with her family this weekend.
> **정답Amy will go to an amusement park with her family this weekend.

---

**05.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
A: __________ you see a doctor next week?
B: Yes, I __________. I already made a reservation.
Does [does]
Were [were]
Are [are]
Will [will]
> **정답** Will [will]

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom will eat lunch with friends last week.
Amy will see a movie with her friend.
Jake is going to go shopping in the
afternoon.
It will rains tomorrow.
> **정답** It will rains tomorrow., Tom will eat lunch with friends last week.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
He will learns how to take pictures this year.
The next train left for Busan soon.
Tom will go to the museum on Sunday.
They don't play soccer tomorrow.
> **정답** Tom will go to the museum on Sunday.

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom will takes a walk with
his dog tomorrow morning.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** takes → take

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
An English speaking contest is
held next month. My friends and I decided to
participate in this contest. We want to win the
competition. Starting tomorrow, we
spoke English for an hour a day.
• participate 참가하다
• competition 대회
> **정답** will be, decided, want, will speak

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom does not wash the dishes
tonight.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** does → will

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They will arrive in Rome next week.
Tom will not go to the hospital tomorrow.
We'll go on a trip this summer.
Amy was going to do Taekwondo from
tomorrow.
> **정답** Amy was going to do Taekwondo from tomorrow.

---

**12.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
We are going to make a plan for the picnic.
can
must
will
may
> **정답** will

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The car accident will happen yesterday.
Tom will publishes his book next year.
Amy went to the movie tomorrow.
Jake will read a book in the library tomorrow.
> **정답** Jake will read a book in the library tomorrow.

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
When are you going to
returning the book?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** returning → return

---

**15.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 어법에 맞게 고치시오.
Tom left for the train station early tomorrow
morning.
> **정답** will leave (is going to leave)

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy will not joins in the
program next week.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** joins → join

---

**17.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 같은 의미로 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을
고르시오.
Are you going to study at a study cafe tomorrow?
Must
Will
May
Can
> **정답** Will

---

**18.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두
고르시오.
나는 내년까지 일본어를 숙달할 것이다.
I am going to mastering Japanese by next
year.
I am going to master Japanese by next year.
I will masters Japanese by next year.
I will master Japanese by next year.
• master 숙달하다, 통달하다
> **정답** I will master Japanese by next year., I am going to master Japanese by next year.

---

**19.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Amy and I __________ table tennis tomorrow.
will play
won't play
played
are going to play
> **정답** played

---

**20.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
__________ you __________ dinner for us?
Tom __________ study science tomorrow.
Would - cooked - is
Are - cook - will
Would - cooking - won't
Would - cook - will
> **정답** Would - cook - will
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 053 조동사 will중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
올해 나는 과학책을 읽을 것이다.[read, science books]
This year I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 will, read, science, books

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Mindy는 내일 온라인 수업을 들을 것이다. [be, take,
online classes]
Mindy  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
tomorrow.
정답 is, going, to, take, online, classes

---

**03.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
draw, pictures
A: What are you going to do on Sunday?
B: I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  for the
exhibition.
정답 am, going, to, draw, pictures

---

**04.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
would, help
A: Does he have a lot of works to do?
B: Yes, he does.  (     )  you  (     )  him?
정답 Would, help

---

**05.** 다음 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
Will you take a taxi?
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  take a taxi?
정답 Are, you, going, to

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (축약형으로 쓸 것)
Pam은 우리에게 거짓말을 하지 않을 것이다. [tell a lie]
Pam  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  to us.
정답 won't, tell, a, lie

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 미래에 대통령이 될 것이다. [become]
I  (     )   (     )  president in the future.
정답 will, become

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
이번 크리스마스에 우리 파티에 와 주시겠습니까? [come]
 you  (     )  to our party this Christmas?
정답 Would (Will), come

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 올해 운전면허증을 딸 것이다. [get, a driver's
license]
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  this year.
정답 will, get, a, driver's, license

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
He [have]  a fight with his friend yesterday. That
night he [be]  very sorry, and he [write]  a letter
to his friend. Tomorrow he
be going to, give (     )  him the letter and
make up with him.
정답 had, was, wrote, is going to give

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 053: 조동사 will - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I __________ be a singer in the future. have was am will
> 정답: will

---

**02.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
She won't play the guitar tomorrow.
is going not to play are not going to play is not going to playing is not going to play
> 정답: is not going to play

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
They __________ have a party next month.
She __________ go swimming tomorrow.
are going to - will are going - is going will - be going to will - are going to
> 정답: are going to - will

---

**04.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오. [2개]
Amy는 이번 주말에 가족들과 동물원에 갈 예정이다.
Amy will go to the zoo with her family this weekend.
Amy are going to the zoo with her family this weekend.
Amy is going to go to the zoo with her family this weekend.,
Amy will go to the zoo with her family this weekend. family this weekend.
Amy be going to go to the zoo with her family this weekend.
> 정답: Amy is going to go to the zoo with her family this weekend., Amy will go to the zoo with her family this weekend.

---

**05.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: __________ you visit a museum next week?
B: Yes, I __________.
I already made a plan.
Does [does] Were [were] Are [are] Will [will]
> 정답: Will [will]

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Jake will eat lunch with friends last week.
Amy will see a movie with her friend.
Tom is going to go shopping in the afternoon.
It will rains tomorrow.
> 정답: It will rains tomorrow., Jake will eat lunch with friends last week.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
He will learns how to cook this year.
The next bus left for Busan soon.
Mina will go to the zoo on Saturday.
They don't play tennis tomorrow.
> 정답: Mina will go to the zoo on Saturday.

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Tom  will  takes  a  walk  with his  dog  tomorrow  morning. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: takes → take

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
A drawing contest is held next month.
My friends and I decided to join this contest.
We want to win the prize.
Starting tomorrow, we drew pictures for an hour a day.
> 정답: will be, decided, want, will draw

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Amy  does  not  clean  the  room tonight. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: does → will

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They will arrive in London next week.
Jake will not go to the dentist tomorrow.
We'll go on a picnic this spring.
Tom was going to do swimming from tomorrow.
> 정답: Tom was going to do swimming from tomorrow.

---

**12.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
We are going to make a plan for the trip. can must will may
> 정답: will

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The big storm will happen yesterday.
Amy will publishes her essay next week.
Jake went to the library tomorrow.
Mina will read a comic book at the cafe tomorrow.
> 정답: Mina will read a comic book at the cafe tomorrow.

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. When  are  you  going  to returning  the  umbrella? 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: returning → return

---

**15.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 어법에 맞게 고치시오. Amy left for the bus stop early tomorrow morning.
> 정답: will leave (is going to leave)

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Jake  will  not  joins  in  the club  next  week. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: joins → join

---

**17.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 같은 의미로 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
Are you going to study at the library tomorrow?
Must Will May Can
> 정답: Will

---

**18.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
나는 내년까지 한국어를 숙달할 것이다.
I am going to mastering Korean by next year.
I am going to master Korean by next year.
I will masters Korean by next year.
I will master Korean by next year.
> 정답: I will master Korean by next year., I am going to master Japanese by next year.

---

**19.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Amy and I __________ badminton tomorrow. will play won't play played are going to play
> 정답: played

---

**20.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
__________ you __________ lunch for us?
Tom __________ study English tomorrow.
Would - cooked - is Are - cook - will Would - cooking - won't Would - cook - will
> 정답: Would - cook - will
